calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-16-2026 Continued To Sep-02-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-04-2025 Continued To Apr-01-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay Litigation; **First Appearance Fees Paid**
Off Calendar Aug-18-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

1 - DEFENDANT MICROSOFT CORPORATION, MOJANG AB.'s Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay Litigation.

Defendants Microsoft Corporation and Mojang AB's motion to compel arbitration and stay litigation is granted. No opposition filed and good cause shown.

2 proposed orders are submitted prior to the hearing. Order is signed.

Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/HEK)

Motion To File Portions Of Declarations Of Ambika Kumar, Juliamarie Abbott, And Suzanne Fogarty Under Seal
Off Calendar Aug-18-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

2 - DEFENDANT MICROSOFT CORPORATION, MOJANG AB.'s Motion To File Portions Of Declarations Of Ambika Kumar, Juliamarie Abbott, And Suzanne Fogarty Under Seal.

Defendants Microsoft Corporation and Mojang AB's motion to file portions of declarations under seal is granted. No opposition filed. Based on the moving parties' papers, the court finds: 1) there is an overriding interest in the matters sought to be sealed that overcomes the right of public access to those matters; 2) the overriding interest supports the sealing request; 3) a substantial probability exists that the overriding interest will be prejudiced if the matters sought to be sealed are not sealed; 4) the proposed sealing is narrowly tailored; and 5) no less restrictive means exists to achieve the overriding interest.

2 proposed orders are submitted prior to the hearing. Order is signed.

Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/HEK)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-03-2025 Continued To Oct-01-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay Litigation; **First Appearance Fees Paid**
Off Calendar Jun-16-2025 Continued To Aug-18-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances via Zoom Conference:
Kiley Grombacher, Esq., of BRADLEY/GROMBACHER, LLP. Tel: 805-270-7100 for plaintiff.
HALEY B. ZOFFER, Esq., of DAVIS WRIGHT TREMAINE LLP. Tel: (213) 633-6800 for defendants Microsoft Corporation and Mojang AB.
Court Reporter: Jane Hong, CSR #11975, email: csrjane@hotmail.com, Tel: 909-831-2644.

The matter not argued/contested. The court adopts its tentative ruling.
